title: Apple Crates
description: Apple Crates adds new blocks based on vanilla wood types, in which you can store and trade items !
body:
![Applecrates Header](https://i.imgur.com/4l2xQ83.png)
## Apple Crates
_Trade and Decorate_  

Apple Crates adds new blocks based on vanilla wood types, in which you can store and trade items !  
These blocks allow you to store your items. They take 29 slots, two more then chest, but come with the added functionality of being a simple shop as well !

Crafting is done with 3 planks and 2 sticks.  
Simple, easy, and ready available !  
  
    
### Hopper Support :

1.19.2 - 2.8.0 adds hopper support.    

Plug a hopper in the back and fill your stock !  
Payment slot not supported.

![Hopper support for applecrates](https://i.imgur.com/35X5oIj.png)

### Support :

> Apple Sapplings : [Built-in support!](https://modrinth.com/mod/applesaplings)  
> Colorful Azaleaa : [Azalea Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/azalea-crates)  
> Biomes O' Plenty : [Plenty O' Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/plenty-o-crates)  
> Oh the Biomes You'll Go : [Byg Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/byg-crates)  
> Integrated Dynamics : [Dynamic Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-crates)  
> Botania : [Botanical Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botanical-crates)  
> Malum : [Malumian Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malumian-crates)  
> Premium Wood : [Premium Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/premium-crates)  
> Fruitful Fun : [Fruit Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fruit-crates)  
> Enlightend End : [Enlightened Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enlightened-crates)  
> Solar Craft: [Solar Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/solar-crates)  
> Tinker's Construct : [Construct Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/construct-crates)  
> Forbidden And Arcanus : [Forbidden Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forbidden-crates)  
> TerraFirmaCraft : [Firma Crates](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/firma-crates)  

  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Riaw_d1tlz4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
   

#### new feature in 1.2.0 : 

Unlimited Shops : [wiki article](https://github.com/ArtixAllMighty/AppleCrates/wiki/Unlimited-Shops)  
turn a crate into a shop with no limits ! (reserved for server ops with command access)

   

Forge : currently supported  
Fabric : supported  
Quilt : planned  

#### innate support for [before 1.19.2] :

> Botania  
> oh the biome's you'll go  
> malum  
> forbidden and arcanus  
> premium wood  
> biomes o plenty  
> fruit trees  
> enlightened-end  

  
![apple crates Creative menu under Decoration Blocks category](https://i.imgur.com/Am6SHjW.png)



Come talk to me in my discord server ! suggestion and bug reports always welcome
